data.title: Inventors from Enumclaw, Wash. create FUNNEL CADDY for funnel draining & storage. Pitcures at PTA-436.
data.description: Two inventors, based in Enumclaw, Wash., discussed their creation, the FUNNEL CADDY, on Jan. 26, 2026. The product serves as a handy device for draining funnels post-use while also doubling as a storage area. With the aim to provide convenience, the invention aims to streamline the funnel maintenance process.

data.title: Medical gas and equipment market to reach $30.05 billion by 2031 with a 6.2% CAGR; $21.03 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 26, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts significant growth in the Medical Gas and Equipment Market. It is estimated to increase from approximately USD 21.03 billion in 2025 to USD 30.05 billion by 2031, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.2%. The report contains insights presented across 250 market data tables and 50 figures.

data.title: Grady Campbell reveals 2026 TOP 50 PE Firms in the Middle Market™. Recognizing  highly reputable small and mid-sized private equity firms.
data.description: In Chicago on January 26, 2026, Grady Campbell, a prominent private equity branding and marketing company, revealed the list of the top 50 PE Firms in the Middle Market™ for 2026. This program recognizes distinguished small and mid-sized private equity firms in the industry.

data.title: NWPCA rebrands as Woodpack Global, mirroring industry growth. Alexandria, Va., Jan. 26, 2026. Reflects advancement.
data.description: Woodpack Global, previously known as the National Wooden Pallet & Container Association (NWPCA), announced its rebranding in Alexandria, Va., on Jan. 26, 2026. The new name signifies the organization's rapid expansion, pioneering technology, and limitless potential in the wooden pallet industry. This change represents a shift towards modernity, echoing the current advancements and capabilities within the sector.

data.title: Webflow collaborates with Google Ads for smarter campaign performance with new integration, launched on Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: A recent strategic initiative has led to the integration of advertising and digital experiences into a unified system, providing marketers with enhanced efficiency and oversight. The integration, unveiled on Jan. 26, 2026, by Webflow in collaboration with Google Ads, streamlines processes for marketers, offering quicker insights and greater autonomy. This development represents a significant shift in the marketing landscape, aiming to improve campaign management and optimize performance.

data.title: RIKS 26 0216 series post buyback on Jan 26, 2026: 45,383,080,943 nominal value.
data.description: After the buyback executed on January 26, 2026, the RIKS 26 0216 series has a total size of 45,383,080,943 in nominal value.

data.title: James B. Dworkin retires and Julie S. Freigang resigns from Horizon Bancorp, Inc. board of directors.
data.description: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. has disclosed the retirement of James B. Dworkin and the resignation of Julie S. Freigang from its Board of Directors. This move signals significant changes in the leadership of the company. Both Dworkin and Freigang have played pivotal roles on the board, and their departures will impact the direction and decision-making processes of the company. The retirement of Dworkin and the resignation of Freigang will leave a notable void, as Dworkin provided valuable insights and experience, while Freigang contributed a strategic perspective. The company now faces the task of filling these vacancies with individuals who can bring fresh ideas and expertise to the table. This transition comes at a crucial time for Horizon Bancorp, Inc., as they navigate challenges and opportunities in the financial sector. Investors and stakeholders will be closely watching as the company moves forward with new leadership to steer its course.

data.title: Diversified Royalty Corp. amends AIR MILES® licenses with Air Miles and BMO, announces on Jan 26. TSX: DIV, $DIV.DB.A.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 26, 2026, Diversified Royalty Corp. disclosed that its wholly-owned subsidiary, AM Royalties Limited Partnership (AM LP), has finalized an amendment deal with Air Miles Loyalty Inc. and the Bank of Montreal (BMO) to modify the terms of the two license agreements governing the AIR MILES® trademarks and associated intellectual property licensed to Air Miles. Diversified Royalty Corp. is listed under TSX as DIV and DIV.DB.A.

data.title: Auntea Jenny returns to 60% profit growth in 2025 after tough 2024 losses, but still lags with only one overseas store.
data.description: After facing revenue contraction in 2024, mid-tier premium tea seller Auntea Jenny reported a strong profit growth in the past year with an expected increase of up to 60% from the previous year. The company's overseas expansion has been limited to just one store, lagging behind larger competitors. Bubble tea companies, once popular among investors, have seen their stocks struggle post-IPO due to intense competition. Auntea Jenny surged post-listing but lost momentum after first-half profits fell short of expectations. Now, the company expects profits between 495 million yuan ($71 million) and 525 million yuan for 2025, driven by store network expansion, cost-saving measures, and supply chain improvements. Despite a recent stock rise, Auntea Jenny's shares are down over 50% from their peak in the previous year. The company's profit forecast reflects a high price-to-earnings ratio of 19 times.

data.title: AMD stock is nearing a buy point before Q4 report on Feb 3, signals potential growth. (Total characters: 77)
data.description: The stock of AMD is nearing a potential buy point as the fabless chipmaker prepares to release its fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report on February 3. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Winter Storm 2026 causes natural gas prices to spike, impacting airlines and delivery stocks.
data.description: The recent winter storm affecting over half of the United States has led to a significant increase in natural gas prices. This surge in prices has impacted various sectors, with airlines experiencing cancellations and delays, and delivery companies seeing a decrease in stock value. The post-Winter Storm 2026 market report highlights the sharp rise in natural gas prices and the corresponding reactions of different stocks to the storm.

data.title: Bitcoin's value below $90,000 deemed a great buy compared to gold as it tends to revisit its 200-week moving average every four years, offering good accumulation opportunities - Benzinga.com
data.description: The ongoing debate over Bitcoin's performance compared to gold is gaining attention in the crypto community. Mark Moss, Satsuma's Chief Bitcoin Strategist, believes Bitcoin is currently undervalued in terms of gold. He points out that historically, BTC tends to revisit its 200-week moving average against gold every four years, presenting a favorable long-term accumulation opportunity. While there may be short-term downside risks, previous patterns indicate attractive times to acquire Bitcoin. Capital Flows, a prominent macro commentator, agrees, stating that liquidity and flow data support the notion that Bitcoin is undervalued, especially as gold is no longer significantly drawing capital. The current positioning in the market is considered neutral. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sarepta stock rises on Elevidys data release; Three-year test results unveiled for embattled gene therapy.
data.description: The stock of Sarepta surged on Monday following the release of the three-year test results for its gene therapy, Elevidys. The positive data led to a significant increase in the company's shares. The future success and potential impact of Elevidys on the gene therapy market are now being questioned.

data.title: Pool expert James White from Loganville, GA, provides off-season pool maintenance tips in a HelloNation article.
data.description: In Loganville, Georgia, on January 26, 2026, a HelloNation article highlighted advice for homeowners in Georgia regarding their swimming pools during winter if they choose not to fully close them. The article featured insights from James White of White's Pools in Loganville, GA. This information provides valuable guidance for maintaining swimming pools during colder months and avoiding common issues.

data.title: Metroblox introduces Ride USD, a USDC-based stablecoin for transportation payments, enhancing low-cost real-time settlements in high-frequency rides.
data.description: In Miami on January 26, 2026, Metroblox unveiled Ride USD, a stablecoin backed by USDC. The new digital currency aims to facilitate low-cost, real-time settlements for high-frequency transportation transactions. Stablecoins are increasingly being embraced as a fundamental financial tool, with global adoption on the rise.

data.title: Clinical leaders in 2026 are disrupting chronic disease markets; global market for next-gen treatments set to reach $88.85 billion by 2030.
data.description: Avant Technologies Inc. reveals that the medical industry is undergoing a transformative phase as the worldwide market for advanced medical treatments is projected to reach $88.85 billion by 2030. This growth is fueled by increased investments in cutting-edge therapies aimed at providing innovative solutions to health challenges.
